removeDoctype.summary: Removes the <!DOCTYPE svg> declaration. Browsers do not need it for inline SVG and it only adds bytes.
removeDoctype.whenEnable: Production web assets and icons where the doctype provides no behavior.
removeDoctype.whenDisable: Workflows that require a full XML document with doctype for validation.

removeXMLProcInst.summary: Strips <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> and similar processing instructions at the top of the file.
removeXMLProcInst.whenEnable: Almost all SVGs embedded in HTML or used as img/src or CSS backgrounds.
removeXMLProcInst.whenDisable: When downstream tools require an XML prolog for parsing.

removeComments.summary: Removes XML comments left by editors and hand-authored notes.
removeComments.whenEnable: Always for production unless comments document required licensing in-file.
removeComments.whenDisable: Rare; keep comments only if your pipeline parses them.

removeMetadata.summary: Deletes <metadata> blocks (often license, layer names, or XMP from Adobe tools). Safe byte savings with no visual effect.
removeMetadata.whenEnable: Shipping icons and UI graphics to production.
removeMetadata.whenDisable: When you must preserve embedded rights or workflow metadata for compliance.
removeMetadata.caution: None for most web use cases.

removeXMLNS.summary: Removes redundant default xmlns attributes when they can be inferred, shrinking attribute noise.
removeXMLNS.whenEnable: Standalone SVG files embedded where the namespace is implicit.
removeXMLNS.whenDisable: SVGs used as documents, mixed namespaces, or fragments that rely on explicit xmlns.
removeXMLNS.caution: Can break unusual namespace setups; off by default in SVGOMG.

removeEditorsNSData.summary: Removes editor-specific namespaced attributes (Adobe, Sketch, Figma cruft) that browsers ignore.
removeEditorsNSData.whenEnable: Exports from design tools for web delivery.
removeEditorsNSData.whenDisable: When you round-trip back into the same editor and need proprietary metadata.

cleanupAttrs.summary: Trims whitespace in attribute values and normalizes quoting so attributes are minimal.
cleanupAttrs.whenEnable: Default for most exports with messy attribute formatting.
cleanupAttrs.whenDisable: When whitespace in attribute values is semantically significant (very rare).

mergeStyles.summary: Combines multiple <style> elements and merges rules where possible before inlining or minifying.
mergeStyles.whenEnable: SVGs with several style blocks from layered exports.
mergeStyles.whenDisable: When separate style blocks must stay isolated for cascade reasons.

inlineStyles.summary: Moves CSS rules from <style> blocks onto matching elements as attributes.
inlineStyles.whenEnable: SVGs that use class-based CSS you want flattened for portability.
inlineStyles.whenDisable: Complex selectors, @media rules, or styles that cannot map 1:1 to attributes.
inlineStyles.caution: Run after mergeStyles; order matters in SVGO multipass.

minifyStyles.summary: Minifies CSS inside <style> elements (whitespace, redundant syntax) before or instead of inlining.
minifyStyles.whenEnable: SVGs that keep internal stylesheets rather than inlined attributes.
minifyStyles.whenDisable: When you rely on readable CSS remaining in the file for debugging.
minifyStyles.caution: Pair with mergeStyles for best results.

convertStyleToAttrs.summary: Converts simple CSS declarations on elements into presentational SVG attributes.
convertStyleToAttrs.whenEnable: Flat icons where styles map cleanly to fill, stroke, and opacity attributes.
convertStyleToAttrs.whenDisable: Complex CSS (pseudo-classes, descendant selectors) that cannot become attributes.
convertStyleToAttrs.caution: Off by default; enable only after checking visual parity.

cleanupIds.summary: Shortens and deduplicates id attributes and updates url(#…) references. Essential for minifying Illustrator exports that ship long random IDs.
cleanupIds.whenEnable: Almost always for production assets unless you rely on stable IDs for CSS, JS, or SMIL animation.
cleanupIds.whenDisable: SVGs with external stylesheets targeting specific IDs, or animations that reference fixed id values you cannot rename.
cleanupIds.caution: Can break fragment references if plugins run in the wrong order or IDs are referenced from outside the file.

removeRasterImages.summary: Deletes embedded PNG/JPEG inside SVG. Shrinks file size but removes bitmap content.
removeRasterImages.whenEnable: Pure vector artwork that accidentally embedded a raster.
removeRasterImages.whenDisable: Any SVG that intentionally mixes vector and bitmap (common in Illustrator).
removeRasterImages.caution: Will leave empty space or broken visuals if the image was essential.

removeUselessDefs.summary: Removes unreferenced items in <defs> (gradients, symbols, paths) after other cleanup passes.
removeUselessDefs.whenEnable: Default; defs bloat is common in design-tool exports.
removeUselessDefs.whenDisable: When defs are referenced dynamically at runtime in ways SVGO cannot see.
removeUselessDefs.caution: Run after path and ID cleanup for accurate reference tracking.

cleanupNumericValues.summary: Rounds numeric attributes (coordinates, opacities) to fewer decimal places.
cleanupNumericValues.whenEnable: Most web SVGs; tune global number precision in SVGOMG.
cleanupNumericValues.whenDisable: Scientific plots or maps needing many decimal places.
cleanupNumericValues.caution: Works with convertPathData; combined rounding can compound.

cleanupListOfValues.summary: Rounds numbers inside space-separated lists (points, viewBox, transforms) for smaller attributes.
cleanupListOfValues.whenEnable: Polygons and polylines with over-precise point lists.
cleanupListOfValues.whenDisable: When list values must stay at full precision for hit-testing or animation.
cleanupListOfValues.caution: Off by default; enable with care on data visualizations.

convertColors.summary: Converts colors to shorter forms (#RGB, named colors) and merges equivalent values.
convertColors.whenEnable: Most illustrated SVGs using hex or rgb() fills and strokes.
convertColors.whenDisable: When wide-gamut or document-specific color profiles must be preserved exactly.
convertColors.caution: Verify brand colors still match after conversion.

removeUnknownsAndDefaults.summary: Drops attributes and elements that match SVG defaults or are unknown to the spec.
removeUnknownsAndDefaults.whenEnable: Safe default for shrinking verbose editor output.
removeUnknownsAndDefaults.whenDisable: When targeting non-standard attributes your runtime depends on.
removeUnknownsAndDefaults.caution: May remove vendor-specific attributes you still need.

removeNonInheritableGroupAttrs.summary: Removes presentation attributes on groups that children cannot inherit meaningfully.
removeNonInheritableGroupAttrs.whenEnable: Deeply nested group structures from Illustrator or Figma.
removeNonInheritableGroupAttrs.whenDisable: Rare edge cases with unusual group styling you rely on.

removeUselessStrokeAndFill.summary: Removes stroke and fill attributes that do not change rendering (e.g. default black fill).
removeUselessStrokeAndFill.whenEnable: Icons and UI assets with redundant presentation attributes on every path.
removeUselessStrokeAndFill.whenDisable: When inheritance chains are subtle and you see missing colors after optimization.

removeViewBox.summary: Strips the viewBox attribute so width and height alone define layout. That often saves bytes but breaks responsive scaling when CSS only sets one dimension.
removeViewBox.whenEnable: Fixed-size icons and assets that never scale (favicons, pixel-perfect UI sprites).
removeViewBox.whenDisable: Responsive SVGs, logos in fluid layouts, or anything using CSS max-width with only a viewBox for aspect ratio.
removeViewBox.caution: After removal, the graphic may render at the wrong size or clip unexpectedly in browsers.

cleanupEnableBackground.summary: Removes or normalizes legacy enable-background attributes from old Illustrator exports.
cleanupEnableBackground.whenEnable: Older SVG assets that still carry enable-background noise.
cleanupEnableBackground.whenDisable: When targeting legacy viewers that still interpret enable-background (uncommon).

removeHiddenElems.summary: Removes elements with display:none or zero opacity that editors leave behind.
removeHiddenElems.whenEnable: Exports from Figma, Sketch, and Illustrator with hidden layers.
removeHiddenElems.whenDisable: If hidden layers are toggled visible by external CSS in your app.
removeHiddenElems.caution: May remove layers you intended to toggle via CSS in rare setups.

removeEmptyText.summary: Deletes empty <text> and <tspan> nodes left by design tools.
removeEmptyText.whenEnable: Text-heavy exports that include placeholder text layers.
removeEmptyText.whenDisable: When empty text nodes are placeholders your scripts populate at runtime.
removeEmptyText.caution: None if the SVG has no text.

convertShapeToPath.summary: Converts rect, circle, ellipse, and line elements to path equivalents, often smaller after path rounding.
convertShapeToPath.whenEnable: Simple shapes in icon sets (default on).
convertShapeToPath.whenDisable: When you need native shape elements for animation or semantic reasons.
convertShapeToPath.caution: Slightly larger output in rare cases for trivial shapes.

moveElemsAttrsToGroup.summary: Hoists common child attributes up to parent <g> elements to reduce duplication.
moveElemsAttrsToGroup.whenEnable: Icons with many paths sharing fill or stroke.
moveElemsAttrsToGroup.whenDisable: When hoisting would change specificity of presentation inheritance.
moveElemsAttrsToGroup.caution: Visual check recommended on layered artwork.

moveGroupAttrsToElems.summary: Pushes group-level presentation attributes down to children when that yields smaller output.
moveGroupAttrsToElems.whenEnable: Deep groups with few children where inlining attrs is cheaper.
moveGroupAttrsToElems.whenDisable: When group-level styling is intentional for later editing.
moveGroupAttrsToElems.caution: Can increase file size if many children inherit the same long values.

collapseGroups.summary: Removes unnecessary wrapper <g> elements that do not affect rendering.
collapseGroups.whenEnable: Default; flattening groups simplifies the tree and aids other plugins.
collapseGroups.whenDisable: When group IDs or transforms must remain for scripting.
collapseGroups.caution: May affect elements targeted by CSS or JS via group structure.

convertPathData.summary: Rewrites path commands with fewer digits and simpler curves. Usually one of the largest wins on complex illustrations.
convertPathData.whenEnable: Detailed paths from design tools with over-precise coordinates (default in SVGOMG).
convertPathData.whenDisable: When sub-pixel accuracy matters for animation paths or geometric CAD-like drawings.
convertPathData.caution: Aggressive rounding can visibly change curves on large viewBoxes; lower number precision if you see drift.

convertEllipseToCircle.summary: Replaces ellipses with equal radii by <circle> elements, which are more compact.
convertEllipseToCircle.whenEnable: Icons and UI with perfect circles exported as ellipses.
convertEllipseToCircle.whenDisable: Non-circular ellipses that must stay elliptical.

convertTransform.summary: Optimizes transform attributes: shorter matrix notation, combined operations, fewer decimals.
convertTransform.whenEnable: Assets with many transform chains from design tools.
convertTransform.whenDisable: Keyframe animations that depend on exact transform strings.
convertTransform.caution: Combine with conservative transform precision if motion looks wrong.

removeEmptyAttrs.summary: Deletes attributes with empty values (fill="", style="", etc.).
removeEmptyAttrs.whenDisable: When empty attributes are intentional sentinels for your toolchain.

removeEmptyContainers.summary: Removes elements that do not render and contain no meaningful children.
removeEmptyContainers.whenEnable: Default; empty groups and wrappers are common bloat.
removeEmptyContainers.whenDisable: When empty elements are placeholders for runtime injection.
removeEmptyContainers.caution: Run after removeHiddenElems for best results.

mergePaths.summary: Combines paths that share styling into fewer elements, reducing DOM size inside the SVG.
mergePaths.whenEnable: Flat icons and illustrations with many same-style paths.
mergePaths.whenDisable: When separate paths must stay independent for scripting or partial styling.
mergePaths.caution: Can change stacking order in edge cases with overlapping paths.

removeUnusedNS.summary: Removes xmlns declarations that are not referenced anywhere in the document.
removeUnusedNS.whenEnable: SVGs with unused namespace declarations from merged files.
removeUnusedNS.whenDisable: Documents that will receive injected namespaced content later.

reusePaths.summary: Replaces duplicate path definitions with <use> references to a single definition.
reusePaths.whenEnable: Icon fonts converted to SVG with repeated glyphs, or repeated shapes.
reusePaths.whenDisable: When duplicate paths need independent transforms or IDs.
reusePaths.caution: Can complicate editing; test visual output after enabling.

sortAttrs.summary: Sorts attributes alphabetically for better gzip compression and consistent diffs.
sortAttrs.whenEnable: Production assets served with compression; teams caring about VCS diffs.
sortAttrs.whenDisable: When attribute order is relied on by non-standard parsers (rare).

sortDefsChildren.summary: Sorts children inside <defs> for stable output and improved compressibility.
sortDefsChildren.whenEnable: SVGs with large symbol libraries or sprite sheets.
sortDefsChildren.whenDisable: When defs order matters for human editing workflows only.

removeTitle.summary: Removes <title> elements used for accessibility tooltips in standalone SVG documents.
removeTitle.whenEnable: Decorative icons where accessible name is provided by surrounding HTML.
removeTitle.whenDisable: Informative standalone SVGs where <title> is the primary accessible name.
removeTitle.caution: Add aria-label on the hosting HTML instead when removing.

removeDesc.summary: Removes <desc> long-description elements, saving bytes when not needed.
removeDesc.whenEnable: Decorative graphics with no need for extended description in the file.
removeDesc.whenDisable: Stand-alone accessible SVGs that rely on <desc> for screen readers.
removeDesc.caution: Prefer HTML-level accessibility when SVG is embedded.

removeDimensions.summary: Removes width/height when viewBox is present so CSS controls sizing.
removeDimensions.whenEnable: Responsive icons and illustrations scaled with CSS.
removeDimensions.whenDisable: Assets that need explicit pixel dimensions without CSS.
removeDimensions.caution: Pair with a valid viewBox; otherwise intrinsic size may collapse.

removeStyleElement.summary: Removes entire <style> blocks after styles have been inlined or are unused.
removeStyleElement.whenEnable: After inlineStyles has flattened rules you still need.
removeStyleElement.whenDisable: SVGs that depend on internal CSS selectors or @rules.
removeStyleElement.caution: Only enable once you confirm styles are inlined or unnecessary.

removeScripts.summary: Strips <script> elements and related event attributes from SVG.
removeScripts.whenEnable: Static assets where scripts are never executed (most web icons).
removeScripts.whenDisable: Interactive SVGs that rely on embedded script.
removeScripts.caution: Security-sensitive sites should remove scripts from user uploads.

removeOffCanvasPaths.summary: Removes paths entirely outside the viewBox clipping region.
removeOffCanvasPaths.whenEnable: Exports with stray geometry far outside the artboard.
removeOffCanvasPaths.whenDisable: Animations or filters that temporarily move paths outside viewBox.
removeOffCanvasPaths.caution: Off by default; verify nothing important is clipped away.
